balcão.reason: sent2 'Pergunta pro balcão se já chegou minha encomenda' personifies the counter as if it were a person you address directly ('pro balcão' = 'to the counter'); a Brazilian would say 'pergunta lá no balcão' or 'pergunta pro pessoal do balcão' — 'balcão' isn't a job title like 'caixa' that doubles as a person, so addressing it directly with 'pro' sounds off.

embaraçado.reason: sent1 'Fiquei todo embaraçado quando ela elogiou na frente de todo mundo' drops the direct object of 'elogiar' — a transitive verb needing a complement. No Brazilian would say bare 'ela elogiou' meaning 'she complimented (me)'; it needs 'ela me elogiou'. As written it reads as an unfinished/ungrammatical sentence, not natural spoken Portuguese.
